scripts.db:reset: npm run db:schema && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:backup: docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml exec -T postgres pg_dump -U postgres --clean --if-exists kdbs2 > db/backup.sql
scripts.db:restore: docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d kdbs2 < db/backup.sql
